features.title: 7-Layer Carpentry Questionnaire

Rate limiting (30 req/min per IP)
60s timeout with AbortController
JSON parse error handling (502 on malformed)

Commission: 30% first payment, 10% lifetime recurring.

features.title: M6 — Engagement Automation (Phase 3)
features.description: Two engagement features: (1) Automated AI-generated weekly/monthly newsletter from regulation updates (replaces manual admin send). (2) Risk reminder emails at 2/6/10 weeks post-scan nudging users to revisit results and upgrade.

prerequisites.text: Migrate email sender domain from @complyradar.de to @smart-lex.de (Resend domain verification, DNS SPF/DKIM/DMARC records on smart-lex.de, update RESEND_DOMAIN env var, update all `from:` strings in send-newsletter/forgot-password/preview-newsletter routes). Deferred from F-BUG-03 rebrand PR because it's infra work, not a string swap — needs DNS access + Resend dashboard + reverification window. Ship before M6 starts because automated newsletters at scale on an unbranded sender domain will hurt deliverability and undercut the Smart Lex brand.

criteria.text: Scheduled job generates newsletter content via GPT-5.2 from recent regulation changes
Admin preview + approve before send (or full auto-send opt-in)
Risk reminder emails triggered at 2, 6, 10 weeks after scan completion
Reminder respects newsletter_preferences opt-out
Links deep-link back to user's scan + upgrade CTA
Mobile responsive emails + i18n DE+EN

features.notes: Part of Phase 3 proposal ($600 for M5+M6 quick-yes bundle). Uses existing Resend + React Email stack. Prereq F-107-PRE-01 (email domain migration to @smart-lex.de) must ship before M6 kickoff — carried over from F-BUG-03 rebrand scope.

features.title: M7 — Consultant Directory (deferred)

Filter by expertise tag, location (PLZ/Bundesland), language
Individual consultant profile pages with bio + contact CTA

features.notes: Deferred in Phase 3 proposal — hold until there are 50+ consultants on the platform. Until then, the referral-code + random-match flow (F-102) is sufficient.

features.title: Dynamic Scan Timeout Fix
features.description: Dynamic scan regularly hits 90s OpenAI abort timeout and returns 'Zeitüberschreitung. Bitte versuchen Sie es erneut.' to the user. Happened live during Raphael's investor demo on 2026-04-22. Root cause: app/api/scan/route.ts:286 requests max_completion_tokens=8000 and prompts GPT-5.2 for 10-20 regulations with 11 fields each — generation regularly exceeds 90s. Confirmed in production PM2 logs on 46.225.92.189.

criteria.text: runDynamicScan calls callOpenAI with max_completion_tokens=4000 (was 8000)
System prompt asks for 'max. 10 wichtigsten Vorschriften' (was '10-20 wichtigsten')
3 consecutive dynamic scans on smart-lex.de (e.g. BERATUNG, PRODUKTION, EINZELHANDEL industries) complete in <60s each without Zeitüberschreitung error
Production PM2 logs show no new 'Scan API error: Error: Zeitüberschreitung' entries for 24h after deploy
Scan output quality unchanged — still returns 8-10 regulations with full field set (name, reference, summary, requirements[], penalty, risk, URL, whyApplies)
No regression on static carpentry scan path (runStaticScan untouched)

features.notes: Verification: after deploy, run 3 scans on smart-lex.de covering different industries and check PM2 logs with `ssh root@46.225.92.189 'pm2 logs complyradar-web --lines 200 --nostream | grep Zeitüberschreitung'` — should be empty for post-deploy timestamps.

features.title: Consultant Dashboard Copy+QR Buttons Fix
features.description: Raphael reports clicking the link icon and QR icon in the top-right corner of the consultant dashboard does nothing. Root cause in components/consultant/ConsultantDashboardScreen.tsx:117-137: (1) Link2 icon on line 117 is purely decorative with no onClick, (2) Copy button only gives a 2-second Check icon swap as feedback — easy to miss, (3) QR toggle works but is visually disconnected. Not a logic bug in QR — a UX/feedback problem.

criteria.text: Clicking anywhere on the blue referral-code pill copies the referral URL to clipboard
On successful copy, a toast/banner 'Link kopiert!' (DE) / 'Link copied!' (EN) appears for 2 seconds
QR button remains a separate clickable button and toggles the QR display (existing behavior preserved)
QR display shows the same referral URL the copy button produces (https://smart-lex.de/de?ref=CODE)
Decorative Link2 icon either removed or made part of the clickable pill — no dead pixels in the pill area
Clipboard fallback preserved for non-HTTPS/old-browser contexts (existing textarea fallback kept)
Mobile responsive: pill stacks below title on <640px, still fully clickable
i18n: 'copySuccess' / 'copyLinkTooltip' keys added to both de.json and en.json Consultant namespace

features.notes: Manual test plan: log in as consultant (test@complyradar.de), go to /de/consultant/dashboard, click pill → see toast, click QR → see QR, scan QR → opens signup with ref param prefilled. Test on desktop Chrome + iPhone Safari.

Scope covers visible UI strings, page meta titles, and email sender/subject lines. Legal/impressum references to 'ComplyRadar' as the company name are OUT OF SCOPE pending confirmation from Raphael (legal entity may still be registered as ComplyRadar).

Email sender domain @complyradar.de stays in this PR and is tracked separately as F-107-PRE-01 (prereq for M6 Engagement Automation) — needs DNS + Resend verification, not just a string swap.

features.title: Consultant API camelCase → snake_case Field Mapping
features.phase: Pre-Launch Polish (discovered during F-BUG-02 post-deploy verification)
features.description: Pre-existing regression from the Supabase→self-hosted Postgres migration on 2026-04-03. Drizzle ORM returns camelCase field names (referralCode, commissionRateInitial, isActive, etc.) but the UI components and lib/consultant-types.ts expect snake_case (referral_code, commission_rate_initial, is_active). Every UI read of these fields was undefined. Visible symptom on /de/consultant/dashboard: the <code> element showing the referral code was empty, commission percentages showed '%' with no number, and the copy-link button copied 'https://smart-lex.de/de?ref=' with an empty ref parameter — this is the actual root cause of Raphael's 'nothing happens' report on F-BUG-02. Discovered via chrome-devtools evaluate_script on smart-lex.de after the F-BUG-02 cosmetic fix deployed.

criteria.text: New lib/consultant-mappers.ts exports toConsultant, toReferral, toHelpRequest mapping Drizzle rows → types defined in lib/consultant-types.ts
GET /api/consultant/dashboard response returns consultant.referral_code populated (not undefined)
GET /api/consultant/dashboard response returns consultant.commission_rate_initial + commission_rate_recurring as numbers
GET /api/admin/consultants response returns consultants[].referral_code + is_active populated, plus existing enriched fields (referral_count, help_request_count, pending_requests)
PATCH /api/admin/consultants response returns the updated consultant in snake_case shape
On smart-lex.de consultant dashboard: <code> element shows the referral code (e.g. 4GXVBMDB), not empty
Clicking the pill writes 'https://smart-lex.de/de?ref=4GXVBMDB' (with the actual code) to clipboard
QR code in consultant dashboard encodes the full URL including the referral code parameter
Admin consultants screen shows active/inactive status toggle correctly, commission rate inputs populated
Build passes clean

features.notes: Chose minimal API-mapping approach (option A) over full type/component rewrite (option B) to minimize blast radius on a live fix. Long-term cleanup: migrate types + components to camelCase to match Drizzle convention. Tracked but not scheduled.

features.title: Expert Analytics (Click Tracking)
features.description: Track clicks on 'Ask a Question' and 'Get Help' buttons. Calculate conversion probability for consultant pricing model. Analytics dashboard for admin.

criteria.text: Click tracking on expert contact buttons

From Raphael (2026-03-28): 'We want to get consultants on board ASAP and after that we sell the leads to them as well.' Future feature: consultants can buy unmatched leads (customers who clicked Get Help without referral code).
